Document:
# Washington Brotherhood of Steel
The Washington Brotherhood of Steel (WBS) is a splinter branch descended from a Midwest Brotherhood expedition that lost contact with their parent organization long ago. Cut off from their origins, they evolved into a purist faction that mirrors the ideals of the original Brotherhood — but with a harder edge.
They are the most formidable military force in the local Wasteland, possessing power armor, energy weapons, and an uncompromising will to use them.
## Philosophy
The Washington Brotherhood holds to strict technological elitism. They believe only they are qualified to possess and utilize advanced technology. They are hostile to mutants of all kinds and deeply suspicious of outsiders.
They act discreetly when possible — but if they choose to act openly, they bring overwhelming firepower.
## Roles
[color=#a4885c]Elder:[/color] The supreme authority of the Washington Brotherhood. All major decisions flow through the Elder. They rarely appear in the field, but their word is absolute law.
[color=#a4885c]Paladin:[/color] Elite warriors in full power armor. The enforcement arm of the Brotherhood — feared throughout the Wasteland.
[color=#a4885c]Knight:[/color] Veteran soldiers outfitted with Brotherhood-standard gear. The backbone of their combat strength.
[color=#a4885c]Scribe:[/color] Scholars and technicians responsible for cataloguing, maintaining, and recovering technology.
[color=#a4885c]Initiate:[/color] New recruits undergoing Brotherhood training. Monitored closely and not yet trusted with the faction's most valuable assets.
## Relations
The Washington Brotherhood has goals here. They want technology. Factions in possession of advanced pre-war equipment should consider themselves targets — unless they can make themselves useful first.
